content.text:
---
import { siteConfig } from '@/config';
interface Props { title?: string; description?: string; cover?: string; }
const { title, description, cover } = Astro.props;
const fullTitle = title === siteConfig.title ? title : `${title} | ${siteConfig.title}`;
---
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <meta name="generator" content={Astro.generator} />
  <title>{fullTitle}</title>
  <meta name="description" content={description} />
  <meta name="author" content={siteConfig.author} />
  <meta property="og:title" content={fullTitle} />
  <meta property="og:description" content={description} />
  <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
  {cover && <meta property="og:image" content={cover} />}
  <meta name="theme-color" content={siteConfig.theme.primaryColor} />
  <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
  <link rel="sitemap" href="/sitemap-index.xml" />
  <link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml" title={siteConfig.title} href="/rss.xml" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.9/dist/katex.min.css" />
</head>

export const siteConfig = {
  title: '像素小站',
  site: 'https://3229154448.github.io/pixel-astro-blog',
  author: 'Pixel',
  motto: '8-Bit Life, Infinite Possibilities.',
  description: '一个像素风格的Astro博客主题',
  lang: 'zh-CN',
  theme: {
    primaryColor: '#41a6f6',
    secondaryColor: '#f77622',
    accentColor: '#e43b44',
    bgColor: '#1a1c2c',
    textColor: '#f4f4f4',
    cardBg: '#262b44',
    borderColor: '#333c57',
    codeBg: '#0d0f1a',
    codeColor: '#33ff33',
    borderRadius: '0px',
    sidebarWidth: 320,
  },
  typewriter: [
    '欢迎来到像素小站 🎮',
    '8-Bit Life, Infinite Possibilities ✨',
    '复古游戏，现代技术 🕹️',
    '像素世界，无限可能 🌟',
  ],
  navbar: [
    { name: '首页', link: '/' },
    { name: '归档', link: '/archives' },
    { name: '分类', link: '/categories' },
    { name: '标签', link: '/tag' },
    { name: '动态', link: '/talking' },
    { name: '圈子', link: '/friends' },
    { name: '友链', link: '/links' },
    { name: '留言', link: '/message' },
    { name: '关于', link: '/about' },
  ],
  sidebar: {
    showCategories: true,
    showTags: true,
    showRecentPosts: true,
    showAnnouncement: true,
    announcement: '🎮 欢迎来到像素小站！这是一个基于Astro的像素风博客主题。',
  },
  comment: {
    enable: false,
    type: 'twikoo' as 'twikoo' | 'waline',
    twikoo: { envId: '' },
    waline: { serverURL: '' },
  },
  reward: {
    enable: true,
    alipay: '/assets/images/alipay.webp',
    wechat: '/assets/images/wechat.webp',
    comment: '感谢支持像素小站！',
  },
  rss: { enable: true, title: '像素小站', description: '一个像素风格的Astro博客主题' },
  sitemap: { enable: true },
};

export type SiteConfig = typeof siteConfig;

现在我已彻底理解了该项目。我将开始系统地进行所有修改。我将从基础样式开始，逐步处理组件。

**步骤 1：Base.less - 完整重写，包含新的配色方案、字体和效果**
Successfully wrote 9379 bytes to /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/pixel-astro-blog/src/styles/Base.less
**步骤 2: ArticleBase.less - 横排布局文章卡片**
Successfully wrote 3746 bytes to /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/pixel-astro-blog/src/styles/ArticleBase.less
**步骤 3: Article.less - 浅色主题的文章详情样式**
Successfully wrote 3636 bytes to /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/pixel-astro-blog/src/styles/Article.less
